"},{"type":"element","tag":"em","props":{},"children":[{"type":"text","value":"keeps you from getting poor"}]},{"type":"text","value":" when systems break."}]},{"type":"element","tag":"p","props":{},"children":[{"type":"element","tag":"strong","props":{},"children":[{"type":"text","value":"2008:"}]},{"type":"text","value":" Stock investors lost 50%. Gold investors lost 5%.\n"},{"type":"element","tag":"strong","props":{},"children":[{"type":"text","value":"2020:"}]},{"type":"text","value":" Cash investors lost 7% to inflation. Gold investors gained 25%.\n"},{"type":"element","tag":"strong","props":{},"children":[{"type":"text","value":"2021-2022:"}]},{"type":"text","value":" Stock investors lost 20%. Gold investors lost 2%.\n"},{"type":"element","tag":"strong","props":{},"children":[{"type":"text","value":"2024:"}]},{"type":"text","value":" Crypto investors gained 150%. Gold investors gained 20%."}]},{"type":"element","tag":"p","props":{},"children":[{"type":"text","value":"Gold doesn't win when systems work. But when systems fail, gold is the only winner."}]},{"type":"element","tag":"p","props":{},"children":[{"type":"text","value":"This is why central banks hold gold. Not for returns. For security."}]},{"type":"element","tag":"h2","props":{"id":"so-what"},"children":[{"type":"text","value":"So What"}]},{"type":"element","tag":"p","props":{},"children":[{"type":"element","tag":"strong","props":{},"children":[{"type":"text","value":"For individual investors:"}]},{"type":"text","value":"\nHold 5-10% in gold. Not as speculation. As insurance. Rebalance annually. Sleep better knowing some of your wealth exists outside any government's control."}]},{"type":"element","tag":"p","props":{},"children":[{"type":"element","tag":"strong","props":{},"children":[{"type":"text","value":"For inflation worriers:"}]},{"type":"text","value":"\nGold hedges unexpected inflation. If you expected inflation, bonds (that pay higher rates) would hedge it. Gold hedges the surprise. In 2021, nobody expected 8% inflation. Those holding 5% gold underperformed those in stocks, until suddenly they didn't."}]},{"type":"element","tag":"p","props":{},"children":[{"type":"element","tag":"strong","props":{},"children":[{"type":"text","value":"For currency crisis concerns:"}]},{"type":"text","value":"\nGold is your international insurance policy. In Argentina, Venezuela, Lebanon—gold holders preserved purchasing power. This is the real edge."}]},{"type":"element","tag":"p","props":{},"children":[{"type":"element","tag":"strong","props":{},"children":[{"type":"text","value":"For the rest:"}]},{"type":"text","value":"\nIgnore gold. Build wealth in stocks and real estate. Hold cash for emergencies. Don't overthink commodities."}]},{"type":"element","tag":"hr","props":{},"children":[]},{"type":"element","tag":"p","props":{},"children":[{"type":"element","tag":"em","props":{},"children":[{"type":"text","value":"Gold's 5,000-year track record isn't because it's magic. It's because throughout history, when currencies fail and institutions collapse, gold remains. That's not an investment thesis. That's insurance."}]}]}],"toc":{"title":"","searchDepth":2,"depth":2,"links":[{"id":"the-gold-paradox","depth":2,"text":"The Gold Paradox"},{"id":"gold-101-what-it-actually-is","depth":2,"text":"Gold 101: What It Actually Is"},{"id":"historical-performance-the-data","depth":2,"text":"Historical Performance: The Data"},{"id":"why-gold-hedges-inflation","depth":2,"text":"Why Gold Hedges Inflation","children":[{"id":"_1-currency-debasement-protection","depth":3,"text":"1. Currency Debasement Protection"},{"id":"_2-real-interest-rates","depth":3,"text":"2. Real Interest Rates"},{"id":"_3-central-bank-actions","depth":3,"text":"3. Central Bank Actions"}]},{"id":"gold-vs-other-hedges","depth":2,"text":"Gold vs. Other Hedges"},{"id":"when-gold-actually-matters","depth":2,"text":"When Gold Actually Matters"},{"id":"gold-in-2026-current-context","depth":2,"text":"Gold in 2026: Current Context"},{"id":"the-practical-guide","depth":2,"text":"The Practical Guide"},{"id":"the-real-story","depth":2,"text":"The Real Story"},{"id":"so-what","depth":2,"text":"So What"}]}},"_type":"markdown","_id":"content:articles:gold-inflation-hedge.md","_source":"content","_file":"articles/gold-inflation-hedge.md","_stem":"articles/gold-inflation-hedge","_extension":"md"},"hash":"mzGdrNC398"}
